rationale: For a Ukrainian resident, confirmed Russian strikes killing nine and damaging a historic cathedral are the direct daily reality — no qualitative change from established war baseline, but the ongoing toll remains at elevated background level.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine in Ukraine and damage historic cathedral
top_events.summary: Confirmed Russian strikes killed nine Ukrainians and damaged a historic cathedral this cycle — ongoing war toll with no qualitative escalation or de-escalation relative to established baseline.

top_events.title: US-Iran to sign a 'peace deal' on Friday; stock markets soar, oil falls
top_events.summary: A US-Iran peace deal signing would further divert US diplomatic attention from Ukraine — deal still unsigned but imminent signing raises concern about Western focus shifting away from Ukrainian support.

top_events.title: Lebanese remain sceptical despite US-Iran ceasefire announcement
top_events.summary: Regional scepticism about the US-Iran deal's durability is noted — for Ukraine, a fragile or failed deal could redirect US attention back, but this remains speculative rhetoric.
